text.title: RAG Failure Taxonomy Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a failure entry and the weekly aggregation report.

field.name: entry.evidence.context_to_model
field.notes: prompt template id, retrieved passages included

field.name: entry.evidence.source_passage_id
field.notes: where the correct answer actually lives

forbidden.pattern: entry.classification outside the closed seven-category list (plus evidence-incomplete)
entry.evidence with any required sub-field empty AND classification != evidence-incomplete
multi-category assignment in entry.classification (use contributing_factors for secondary tags)
weekly_report missing for more than 2 consecutive weeks
recommended_fix_path = hybrid (default fix paths exist; hybrid requires written justification)
entry created with classification but no evidence link to the underlying logs (un-auditable)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Reclassify a failure when new evidence surfaces (e.g. the source passage was found to be stale); record the original classification in entry.history.
Aggregate entries from the same root cause across the same week (e.g. 12 retrievals all failing because the embedding model was wrong) into one parent issue with child references.
Mark entries with classification = evidence-incomplete and route to a backfill queue, not the main weekly report.

list.item: Classification is one of the seven categories
Evidence sub-fields populated (retrieval, context, output, source)
Recommended fix path matches the default for the classification (or has justification)
